title: Materials Science & Engineering
recommendedTrackSummary: AST-2 is the current closest Green River transfer path for this degree because it matches 12 of the 21 degree-specific Green River classes currently tracked for this major.
whyThisTrack: AST-2 has the strongest direct overlap with the current degree-specific Green River class list, including CHEM& 161, ENGL& 101, MATH& 151, MATH& 152, plus 8 more.

This auto-match compares every hardcoded course in the current Green River transfer tracks against the major's tracked Green River classes and keeps the track with the highest concrete course overlap.
Use the remaining major-specific checklist items to add the classes that AST-2 does not cover by itself.

beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: Outside-MSE Technical Electives
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.note: A maximum of 9 credits in approved outside-MSE courses may satisfy the technical electives requirement. 500-level courses from approved outside departments may satisfy the outside technical elective requirement, but require adviser or manual audit update. Any outside course not listed requires a Course Substitution Petition Form.
